_notes: Hand-curated by walking the US Core Immunization differential (7 elements) against the R4 Immunization snapshot. Verified with PowerShell. Covers: binding version pin removal (status), binding tightening (vaccineCode example->extensible with new CVX ValueSet), reference profile narrowing (patient), MustSupport additions, and a SHOULD-level constraint (us-core-5).

drifts.description: Constraint 'us-core-5' added (severity: warning): vaccineCode SHOULD have a translation to the NDC value set. R4 base Immunization does not carry this constraint.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Binding version pin removed: R4 binds to 'immunization-status|4.0.1' (version-locked). US Core binds to 'immunization-status' (no version pin). Strength remains required in both.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present). Binding unchanged (example:immunization-status-reason in both).
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).

Binding changed: R4 uses example strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/vaccine-code. US Core tightens to extensible strength with http://cts.nlm.nih.gov/fhir/ValueSet/2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1010.6 (CVX codes for US vaccines). Binding strength tightened: example -> extensible.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Patient). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-patient).
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical). Types are unchanged (dateTime|string in both).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Immunization.status in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Immunization.statusReason in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Immunization.vaccineCode in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Immunization.patient in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Immunization.occurrence[x] in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Immunization.primarySource in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
